title: Method and apparatus for managing navigation of web content
abstract: A method for managing navigation of web content by displaying an indicia on a first content on a screen of the electronic device, the indicia indicating an availability of a second content related to the first content, detecting an input on at least one portion of the first content, and displaying the second content related to the at least one portion of the first content on the screen.
claims: Claims ( 14 ) A method for operating an electronic device, the method comprising: displaying an indicia on at least one portion of first content on a screen of the electronic device, wherein the indicia indicates an availability of a second content related to the at least one portion of the first content; detecting a first input selecting the at least one portion of the first content; and displaying the second content on the screen. The method of claim 1, further comprising: detecting a second input selecting the second content; and displaying the at least one portion of the first content on the screen at a position of the second content. The method of claim 1, wherein the second content is hidden behind the at least one portion of the first content. The method of claim 1, wherein the displaying the second content comprises displaying the second content along with remaining portions of the first content other than the at least one portion of the first content, by displaying the second content on the screen at a position of the at least one portion of the first content. The method of claim 1, wherein the second content is determined from a list comprising at least one identifier of the second content, and wherein the second content related to the at least one portion of the first content is determined by: identifying semantics associated with the at least one portion the first content; and determining the second content related to the at least one portion of the first content based on the semantics. The method of claim 1, wherein the second content comprises a primary content and a secondary content, wherein the primary content is related to the at least one portion of the first content and the secondary content is related to the primary content. A method for operating an apparatus, the method comprising: receiving an identifier of at least one portion of first content from an electronic device; determining second content related to the at least one portion of the first content; and transmitting, to the electronic device, a list comprising at least one identifier of the second content. The method of claim 7, wherein the determining the second content comprises: identifying semantics associated with the at least one portion the first content; and determining the second content related to the at least one portion of the first content based on the semantics. The method of claim 8, further comprising: detecting pre-defined identifiers associated with the at least one portion of the first content. The method of claim 9, further comprising: determining the at least one identifier for the second content based on the semantics. The method of claim 10, further comprising: generating an index of a web page associated with the at least one identifier of the second content, wherein the index comprises the pre-defined identifiers and the at least one identifier for the second content; and generating the list based on the index. The method of claim 7, wherein the second content comprises a primary content and a secondary content, wherein the primary content is related to the at least one portion of the first content and the secondary content is related to the primary content. An electronic device configured to implement a method of any one of claims 1 to 6. An apparatus configured to implement a method of any one of claims 7 to 12.
